case_title: LUCHIL ENTERPRISES vs. THE FLAMER GROUP et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCHIL ENTERPRISES AS TO DEFENDANT THE FLAMER GROUP FLAMER AND COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT THE FLAMER GROUP FLAMER AND COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCHIL ENTERPRISES COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-31-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/STEVEN LITTMAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESITUTION OF PREMISES AT 22 2ND ST, #333, S.F, CA. - RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED - $7,076 RENT & DAMAGES W/SEC. DEP. FORF. TO PL. & TO BE CREDITED TOWARD JUDGMENT AMOUNT - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 6-14-94 - $902 ATTY FEES. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE FLAMER GROUP FLAMER AND COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 22 2ND ST, #333, S.F, CA. $7,076.00 RENT, $902.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,978.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-14-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEC. DEP. RETAINED BY PL. & TO BE CREDITED TOWARD MONEY JUDGMENT. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY.
